productDisplayName: Lotto Men Silver & Green Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this lotto shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsGrey shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups, overlays and inlaysMesh and padded tongue and padded innerFoamy rubber midsoleWaffle patterned lugs with decoupled heel on the TPU outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
